channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ravens star Kyle Hamilton talks about helping military children for NFL's annual My Cause My Cleats
item.description: Ravens star safety Kyle Hamilton is participating in this year's My Cause My Cleats by highlighting Our Military Kids, a nonprofit helping children of military parents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 2 UConn falls again in Maui, losing 73-72 to Colorado on Jakimovski's off-balance layup
item.description: Andrej Jakimovski converted an off-balance layup with 8 seconds left, and Colorado handed No. 2 UConn its second loss in two days at the Maui Invitational, beating the two-time defending national champion 73-72.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: North Carolina football coach Mack Brown won't return for 2025 season
item.description: Mack Brown sounded firm in his intent to return for another season as North Carolina's coach. A day later, the school announced it was time for a change instead.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State coach Ryan Day offers shocking comparison when discussing losing to rival Michigan
item.description: The Michigan-Ohio State rivalry has long been viewed as a defining game for both team's coaches. Ryan Day's limited success against the Wolverines has fueled criticism.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Traffic citations against Dolphins' Tyreek Hill dismissed after officers no-show at hearing
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Traffic citations issued to Miami Dolphins star wide receiver Tyreek Hill after a September altercation with police have been dismissed after the charging officers didn't attend a court hearing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sydney Thomas, who was ring girl for Paul-Tyson fight, hits extraordinary social media milestone
item.description: Sydney Thomas, the ring girl who captured the attention of the internet during the Jake Paul-Mike Tyson spectacle, revealed she reached the 1 million follower mark on TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rays must decide fate of stadium deal by Dec. 1, Pinellas commission chair says
item.description: The Pinellas County Commission is seeking answers from the Tampa Bay Rays organization on its embattled stadium deal.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Broncos def. Raiders 29-19
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Denver Broncos overcame a sluggish start to secure a 29-19 win over the Las Vegas Raiders on Sunday, thanks to a second-half spark from quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Williams unable to carry Bears to victory, Chicago loses in OT to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Caleb Williams put on the Superman cape at the end of the fourth quarter, but the Chicago Bears still couldn't get out of their own way in an overtime loss to the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday at Soldier Field. Here's a breakdown of how the game transpired.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Giannis gets triple-double as Bucks rout Pacers in NBA Cup
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 37 points, 11 assists, and 10 rebounds for his second triple-double in his last four games, and the Milwaukee Bucks beat the Indiana Pacers 129-117 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Purdy, Bosa out for Green Bay matchup, Allen steps up as QB
item.description: (KRON) – San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan announced in a press conference Friday that quarterback Brock Purdy will be out for Sunday’s game against the Green Bay Packers. Purdy injured his right shoulder in last Sunday's loss to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Bidding war set to begin for star right fielder Juan Soto
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- After meeting with Juan Soto, Yankees managing general partner Hal Steinbrenner is unsure of their chances of resigning the star right fielder. Steinbrenner added that it was a very honest back and forth and that it lasted a couple of hours.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Brayden Point's OT winner helps Lightning rally past Penguins, 3-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored at 3:58 of overtime and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Pittsburgh Penguins 3-2 on Tuesday night. Point’s overtime winner was his 10th goal of the season. Anthony Cirelli scored his fifth goal of the season. Andrei Vasilevskiy stopped 17 shots for Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, WFLA, NBC
